title: ranunculus pyrenaeus subsp. amplexicaulis
intro: Ranunculus pyrenaeus subsp. amplexicaulis is a subspecies of flowering plant in the buttercup family, Ranunculaceae, characterized by its broad, clasping leaves and delicate white flowers. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Ranunculus pyrenaeus subsp. amplexicaulis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infection. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, although its use should be carefully monitored due to potential toxicity.
